NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SORUN, KAREN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY INFANTE, ABEL AS TO DEFENDANT SORUN, KAREN MENDOZA, LILY MANIO C/O THOMPSON, DAVID/PROPERTY - ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INFANTE, ABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORUN, KAREN MENDOZA, LILY MANIO C/O THOMPSON, DAVID/PROPERTY - $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $265.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INFANTE, ABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SORUN, KAREN MENDOZA, LILY MANIO C/O THOMPSON, DAVID/PROPERTY - JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25035 ON 5-8-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
